title: phyllanthus squamifolius
intro: Phyllanthus squamifolius, also known as the square-stemmed phyllanthus, is a type of plant species native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating liver and kidney disorders, due to its high concentration of flavonoids and alkaloids. The health benefits of Phyllanthus squamifolius include its potential to protect against liver damage, improve immune function, and act as an anti-inflammatory agent. Herbal preparations of Phyllanthus squamifolius often take the form of teas, infusions, or capsules, and are commonly used in traditional medicine to treat a range of ailments.
